requirements.jd_requirement: Conduct comprehensive threat modeling of application and infrastructure layers, identifying high-leverage gaps and building pragmatic remediation roadmap
requirements.matched_skills: Vulnerability remediation automation, Deployable security controls, Risk reduction engineering
requirements.evidence: I do my best work where the problems are messy and the constraints are real — I turn ambiguity into a clear plan, then ship tooling and automation that teams can actually run and maintain.

requirements.jd_requirement: Harden AWS infrastructure: IAM least-privilege, secrets management, network segmentation, CloudTrail audit coverage, GuardDuty alerting
requirements.matched_skills: IAM implementation, Secrets management, Secure cloud operations, AWS ECS deployments
requirements.evidence: I work well at the intersection of infrastructure, security, and application engineering — delivering containerized services in cloud environments with operational realities baked in.

requirements.jd_requirement: Integrate security tooling into CI/CD pipeline: SAST, dependency scanning, container image scanning, secret detection
requirements.matched_skills: CI/CD pipelines, Automated build and deploy workflows, Infrastructure as Code
requirements.evidence: I automate high-friction workflows with Python and PowerShell — building CI/CD-oriented workflows and operational tooling that prioritize repeatability, maintainability, and handoff quality.

requirements.jd_requirement: Partner with engineering on SOC 2 Type II posture: evidence collection, control design, vendor risk
requirements.matched_skills: Requirements-to-controls translation, Operational documentation, Stakeholder communication
requirements.evidence: I document decisions, write clear runbooks, and communicate security risks to non-security audiences without FUD — turning ambiguity into scalable guardrails.

requirements.jd_requirement: Build secure-by-default patterns and libraries (authn/authz helpers, input validation, secure logging/redaction)
requirements.matched_skills: Authentication and authorization patterns, Internal security tool development, Flask/FastAPI backend APIs
requirements.evidence: I build internal security tooling with Python backends and React frontends — focusing on patterns that scale without reinventing per-service security.

requirements.jd_requirement: Perform regular threat modeling, vulnerability assessments, and pen testing; partner directly with engineering to remediate findings
requirements.matched_skills: Secure implementation practices, Vulnerability remediation automation, Risk reduction engineering
requirements.evidence: I focus on deployable controls and measurable risk reduction — not just analysis — ensuring findings translate into reliable, automated remediation.

requirements.jd_requirement: Own identity and access infrastructure: SSO, MFA enforcement, SCIM provisioning, access reviews
requirements.matched_skills: MFA integrations, Cross-team IAM coordination, Authentication provider integration
requirements.evidence: I design identity systems that scale across teams — integrating SSO/MFA/SCIM while ensuring access reviews and revocation are operationalized, not manual.

requirements.jd_requirement: Manage third-party and vendor security risk: due diligence, annual reviews
requirements.matched_skills: Multi-source ingestion, Asset reconciliation, Inventory drift resolution
requirements.evidence: I reconcile inconsistent records into actionable data — building pipelines that surface vendor risk gaps before they become exposure.

requirements.jd_requirement: Contribute to security documentation, internal runbooks, and team education
requirements.matched_skills: Operational documentation, Cross-functional execution, Requirements-to-controls translation
requirements.evidence: I make the secure path the easy path — by creating clear runbooks, documentation-first workflows, and enabling engineers to self-serve security.

requirements.jd_requirement: Scripting and automation chops (Python, Bash) to build scalable security tooling
requirements.matched_skills: Python automation, Remediation scripting, Runbook-driven automation
requirements.evidence: I build tools to make security scalable — not just write policies — using Python and Bash to automate high-friction workflows end-to-end.

requirements.jd_requirement: Familiarity with data security for sensitive personal/financial data: encryption, classification, minimization
requirements.matched_skills: Data normalization, Confidence matching, Entity resolution
requirements.evidence: I build pipelines that normalize and reconcile sensitive data across sources — ensuring classification, minimization, and encryption controls are enforced operationally.

tone_notes: Match Loancrate’s pragmatic, builder-oriented tone: avoid FUD or abstract mission statements. Emphasize operational outcomes, frictionless security, and shipping maintainable tooling — not just compliance or policy. Mirror phrases like 'turn ambiguity into a plan', 'secure defaults', and 'engineers move fast and sleep at night'.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a builder-operator who makes security scalable by embedding guardrails into engineering workflows — especially where fintech compliance, cloud-native infrastructure, and developer velocity intersect.
